'''Pulse-wave cannons''' were powerful energy weapons that fired packets of coherent energy.<ref name="AEG">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref> The cannons were used in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]<ref name="EGTD" /> and the [[Xim Wars]].<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> They were used by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] who mounted them on their [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]].<ref name="EGTD" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
